title: Caramelized Thai Carrot Stir-fry
description: An earthy and adventurous Thai dish featuring tender carrots caramelized with dark brown sugar, a whole30-friendly option.

ingredients.name: carrots
ingredients.notes: preferably peeled and cut into thin strips

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add dark brown sugar and stir until it melts and becomes golden brown.
Add minced garlic to the melted brown sugar and cook for about 30 seconds, stirring occasionally, until fragrant but not burnt.
Increase heat to high. Add carrot strips and toss them in the hot mixture for about 5 minutes or until they become tender.
Remove from heat and add lemon juice and fish sauce (if using) to balance flavors. Toss to coat evenly.
Serve immediately with a side of rice, if desired.
